name: Patient 50
history: Longstanding 14-year friendship with Ethan since high school. Shared personal crises and professional collaborations. Learned Ethan has been abusive to girlfriend.
helpless_belief: I am trapped between loyalty and morality
unlovable_belief: I am a bad friend for judging
worthless_belief: I am immoral for not acting sooner
intermediate_belief: My friendship with Ethan makes me complicit in his abuse.
intermediate_belief_depression: I've wasted years on a friendship with a terrible person.
coping_strategies: Avoidance, moral rumination, seeking external validation for decision.
auto_thought: "If I confront him, I lose my friend. If I stay silent, I'm condoning abuse. There's no right choice."
behavior: Drafts and deletes messages, talks to mutual friends, postpones decision.
